sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82325" key="perisfuri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-σφῠρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82325.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ankle-bandage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:67t" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.67t</biblScope> </bibl>it.</sense> </entryFree>
